headline: Documented cases occurred closer to interstate highways
description: Case locations averaged 1,578.39 m from the nearest interstate compared with 2,081.84 m for Washington, D.C. census tract centroids.

headline: Most documented cases were within two kilometers of an interstate
description: 70.5% of documented case locations occurred within 2 km of a major interstate.

headline: Highest documented case density
description: Suitland Parkway exhibited the highest documented case density (7.46 cases per kilometer).
